---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)

data_paa <- readRDS("data_paa.rds")
```

```{r}
paa_param <- c("augmentation",
               "architecture", 
               "epochs", 
               "learning_rate", 
               "Classification.level",
               "num_class", 
               "num_img", 
               "curation", 
               "PAA")

data_paa_param <- data_paa %>% 
  mutate(architecture = as.factor(architecture),
         curation = as.factor(curation)) %>% 
  filter(if_all(all_of(paa_param), 
                ~ !is.na(.))) %>% 
  select(-id, 
         -author, 
         -journal, 
         -year, 
         -citations)

model1 <- lm(PAA ~ num_img + num_class + curation + epochs + learning_rate + augmentation, 
               data = data_paa_param)

summary(model1)

options(na.action = "na.fail")
dredge(model1)

```
